assertions.scriptName: ALTER SUBSCRIPTION ADD PUBLICATION is case-sensitive
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION ADD PUBLICATION accepts refresh false
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION SET PUBLICATION accepts refresh false
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION DROP PUBLICATION accepts refresh false
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION SET slot_name none requires disabled subscription
assertions.query:
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION subscription_enabled_slot_guard
						SET (slot_name = NONE);

assertions.scriptName: ALTER SUBSCRIPTION SET slot_name none requires disabled subscription
CREATE SUBSCRIPTION preserves publication order
CREATE SUBSCRIPTION rejects duplicate publications
assertions.query:
CREATE SUBSCRIPTION subscription_duplicate_create_sub
						CONNECTION 'host=127.0.0.1 dbname=postgres'
						PUBLICATION duplicate_pub, duplicate_pub
						WITH (connect = false, enabled = false, create_slot = false, slot_name = NONE);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE SUBSCRIPTION rejects duplicate connect options
assertions.query:
CREATE SUBSCRIPTION subscription_duplicate_connect_option_sub
						CONNECTION 'host=127.0.0.1 dbname=postgres'
						PUBLICATION duplicate_connect_pub
						WITH (connect = false, connect = false,
							enabled = false, create_slot = false, slot_name = NONE);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE SUBSCRIPTION rejects duplicate connect options
CREATE SUBSCRIPTION rejects duplicate enabled options
assertions.query:
CREATE SUBSCRIPTION subscription_duplicate_enabled_option_sub
						CONNECTION 'host=127.0.0.1 dbname=postgres'
						PUBLICATION duplicate_enabled_pub
						WITH (connect = false, enabled = false, enabled = false,
							create_slot = false, slot_name = NONE);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE SUBSCRIPTION rejects duplicate enabled options
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION rejects duplicate synchronous_commit options

CREATE SUBSCRIPTION rejects duplicate slot_name options

CREATE SUBSCRIPTION subscription_duplicate_slot_name_create_sub
						CONNECTION 'host=127.0.0.1 dbname=postgres'
						PUBLICATION duplicate_slot_name_create_pub
						WITH (connect = false, enabled = false, create_slot = false,
							slot_name = NONE, slot_name = 'kept_slot');

assertions.scriptName: CREATE SUBSCRIPTION rejects duplicate slot_name options
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION rejects duplicate slot_name options
assertions.query:
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION subscription_duplicate_slot_name_alter_sub
						SET (slot_name = 'original_slot', slot_name = NONE);

assertions.scriptName: ALTER SUBSCRIPTION rejects duplicate slot_name options
CREATE SUBSCRIPTION rejects duplicate synchronous_commit options
assertions.query:
CREATE SUBSCRIPTION subscription_duplicate_sync_commit_create_sub
						CONNECTION 'host=127.0.0.1 dbname=postgres'
						PUBLICATION duplicate_sync_commit_create_pub
						WITH (connect = false, enabled = false, create_slot = false,
							slot_name = NONE, synchronous_commit = 'off',
							synchronous_commit = 'local');

assertions.scriptName: CREATE SUBSCRIPTION rejects duplicate synchronous_commit options
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION rejects duplicate binary options
assertions.query:
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION subscription_duplicate_binary_alter_sub
						SET (binary = false, binary = true);

CREATE SUBSCRIPTION rejects empty slot name
assertions.query:
CREATE SUBSCRIPTION subscription_empty_slot_create_sub
						CONNECTION 'host=127.0.0.1 dbname=postgres'
						PUBLICATION empty_slot_pub
						WITH (connect = false, enabled = false, create_slot = false, slot_name = '');

assertions.scriptName: ALTER SUBSCRIPTION rejects empty slot name
assertions.query:
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION subscription_empty_slot_alter_sub
						SET (slot_name = '');

assertions.scriptName: ALTER SUBSCRIPTION rejects empty slot name
CREATE SUBSCRIPTION rejects invalid streaming option
assertions.query:

						CONNECTION 'host=127.0.0.1 dbname=postgres'
						PUBLICATION invalid_streaming_pub
						WITH (connect = false, enabled = false, create_slot = false, slot_name = NONE, streaming = definitely_invalid);

assertions.scriptName: ALTER SUBSCRIPTION rejects invalid streaming option
assertions.query:
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION subscription_invalid_streaming_alter_sub
						SET (streaming = definitely_invalid);
